prediction.reasoning: The price prediction is generated using a Monte Carlo simulation based on the Geometric Brownian Motion (GBM) model. Historical daily price data for NEE from the past two years (approximately 500 trading days, 2022-05-29 to 2024-05-28) was used to estimate the average daily log return (mu = 0.000287) and daily standard deviation of log returns (sigma = 0.0145). A total of 20000 simulations were run, projecting the price of NEE over the next 18 trading days. The point estimate is the median of these simulated prices. Confidence intervals are calculated directly from the percentiles of the distribution of simulated prices (e.g., the 50% CI is between the 25th and 75th percentiles).
